description: Manufactures industrial equipment, machinery, hydraulic/pneumatic systems, compressors, pumps
examples: CNC machines, hydraulic presses, industrial conveyors, pumps, compressors
disambiguation_notes: Must have own factory/brand. If also installs → still MWD if primary activity is manufacturing. Includes farm equipment manufacturers. Excludes chemical/adhesive products (→ Chemical & Process Manufacturing).

description: Fabricates metal products in a shop/factory: custom metalwork, structural steel, welding, machined metal parts
examples: Welding shops, steel fabricators, structural steel, metal stamping, sheet metal
disambiguation_notes: Shop-based fabrication. If primarily on-site/mobile welding → S&T > Industrial & Commercial Field Services > Welding & Fabrication Services

description: Makes precision parts, specialty components, instruments, optics
examples: Fuel injectors, cutting tools, precision instruments, specialty hardware, optics, bearings
disambiguation_notes: Focus on high-precision or specialty parts vs general metal fab

description: Manufactures safety and security products
examples: Fire extinguishers, safety harnesses, PPE, locks, safes, surveillance cameras
disambiguation_notes: If installs/services security systems → Services & Trades > Security & Alarm Systems

description: Manufactures chemicals, adhesives, coatings, lubricants, cleaning compounds, or process chemicals
examples: Adhesive manufacturers, industrial chemical companies, paint/coating manufacturers, lubricant companies, cleaning product manufacturers
disambiguation_notes: NEW in V7. Must manufacture chemical products. If distributes chemicals → Industrial & Commercial Supplies. If cleaning service → S&T > Cleaning Services. Includes contract processors: powder coating, galvanizing, anodizing, heat treating, plating (customer owns material, business applies process). These stay in MWD — manufacturing ecosystem identity.

description: Manufactures furniture, cabinetry, fixtures, custom closets, garage storage systems
examples: Office furniture, kitchen cabinets, store fixtures, shelving, custom millwork, custom closets, garage cabinetry/storage (Garage Living), wine cellars, staircases/railings
disambiguation_notes: V7: Absorbs ~32 accounts from dissolved Manufacturing & Installation. Classify here even if the manufacturer also installs — installation is a delivery mechanism, not a classification driver. Tag as business_model:make_and_install if they also do on-site installation.

description: Manufactures clothing, textiles, fabrics
examples: Clothing mfg, fabric mills, upholstery mfg, uniforms, custom embroidery at scale
disambiguation_notes: Small embroidery/print shops → Marketing & Creative Services > Printing & Graphics

description: Handcrafted or custom artisan goods where the craft/handmade nature IS the value proposition
examples: Cigars, ceramics, custom leather goods, bespoke jewelry, artisan candles, handcrafted instruments, picture frames, luxury handcraft
disambiguation_notes: Small-batch, craft-focused. The product must be valued BECAUSE it is handmade/artisan. Commodity chemicals, industrial coatings, tire sealants → Chemical & Process Manufacturing. Industrial cleaning products → Chemical or Industrial. Carbonless paper → Packaging & Containers. Engraving/stamping/3D printing as a service → S&T or PBS > Printing & Graphics. Small company size alone does NOT make something artisan. SIGN SHOPS → Printing & Graphics.

description: Manufactures home improvement and accessories products including window treatments, screens, awnings, and window film
examples: Window treatments, lighting fixtures, bathroom accessories, decorative hardware, retractable screens, custom awnings, window film, motorized shades
disambiguation_notes: V7: Absorbs ~18 accounts from dissolved Manufacturing & Installation. Classify here even if they also install — tag as business_model:make_and_install.

description: Produces food or beverage products for wholesale/retail distribution
examples: Bakeries (wholesale), breweries, food processors, bottling plants, spice companies
disambiguation_notes: Production/manufacturing focus. Restaurants/cafes → Retail & Consumer

description: Manufactures medical or dental devices, surgical instruments
examples: Surgical instruments, dental equipment, bioprocessing equipment, lab equipment
disambiguation_notes: Must manufacture devices. Medical supply distributor → Medical & Pharmaceutical Distribution

description: Manufactures pharmaceuticals, biotech products, supplements
examples: Drug manufacturing, biotech research products, nutraceuticals, compounding pharmacy
disambiguation_notes: Compounding pharmacies that manufacture → here. Retail pharmacy → Retail & Consumer

description: Manufactures electronic components, devices, or technology hardware
examples: Circuit boards, sensors, LED lighting mfg, telecommunications equipment, AV equipment
disambiguation_notes: Must manufacture hardware. IT consulting/software → Professional & Business Services. Resellers/distributors → Electronics & Technology Distribution

description: Manufactures building and construction materials, prefab structures, and architectural products
examples: Concrete products, lumber processing, roofing materials mfg, insulation, glass, prefab sheds/barns/gazebos/carports, dock systems, fabric/membrane structures
disambiguation_notes: Manufacturing of materials and prefab structures. Distribution of materials → Building Materials Distribution. V7: Absorbs ~17 accounts from dissolved Manufacturing & Installation (outdoor structures, glass/stone fabrication, industrial flooring).

description: Manufactures packaging materials, containers, boxes
examples: Corrugated boxes, plastic containers, glass bottles, pallets, crating
disambiguation_notes: Focus on packaging as a product. Shipping/logistics services → Transportation & Logistics

description: General or mixed wholesale/distribution not fitting specific categories
examples: Multi-line distributors, general merchandise wholesalers, mixed product distributors
disambiguation_notes: Catch-all for distribution. Use specific distribution L3 when product focus is clear

description: Distributes industrial equipment, machinery, heavy equipment parts
examples: Construction equipment parts, pressure washers, shipping containers, welding supplies
disambiguation_notes: Distributes but does not manufacture. If also services/repairs → classify by primary revenue

description: Distributes industrial and commercial supplies including chemicals
examples: Mining supplies, lab supplies, cleaning product wholesale, safety/PPE distribution, abrasives, industrial chemicals
disambiguation_notes: B2B supply distribution. If B2C retail → Retail & Consumer. Chemical manufacturer → Chemical & Process Manufacturing

description: Distributes food or beverage products to retailers/restaurants
examples: Food service distributors, beverage wholesalers, specialty food importers
disambiguation_notes: Wholesale/distribution to businesses. Restaurants/cafes/retailers selling to consumers → Retail & Consumer > Food & Beverage Retail

description: Distributes medical supplies, devices, or pharmaceutical products
examples: Medical supply companies, dental supply distributors, pharmaceutical distributors
disambiguation_notes: Distribution only. If manufactures → Medical & Life Sciences Manufacturing

description: Distributes electronics, technology products, or components
examples: Computer parts distributors, AV equipment distributors, telecom equipment wholesale, two-way radio resellers
disambiguation_notes: PROMOTED to own L2 in V7 (was under Specialty Distribution). Distribution of tech products. IT services/consulting → PBS. If B2C retail (storefront/ecommerce) → Retail & Consumer

description: Distributes building and construction materials
examples: Lumber yards, plumbing supply houses, electrical supply distributors, hardware wholesale
disambiguation_notes: PROMOTED to own L2 in V7 (was under Specialty Distribution). Supply/distribution of construction materials. Manufacturing → Building Materials & Components

description: Distributes automotive parts and accessories
examples: Auto parts wholesalers, aftermarket parts distributors, tire distributors
disambiguation_notes: Parts distribution. Repair shops/service centers → Retail & Consumer > Automotive Services & Retail

description: Distributes consumer goods, lifestyle products
examples: Cosmetics distributors, sports merchandise wholesale, fashion wholesale, CBD wholesale
disambiguation_notes: B2B distribution of consumer products. Direct B2C retail → Retail & Consumer

description: Goods/freight movement businesses that are part of the product supply chain
examples: Freight brokers, trucking companies hauling goods, 3PL warehousing, fulfillment centers, logistics providers
disambiguation_notes: ONLY for goods/freight movement. Moving/relocation companies → S&T > Moving & Relocation. Towing/rigging/heavy equipment moving → S&T > Moving & Relocation. Passenger transit → flag edge case. Jet charter → flag edge case. Truck parking → PBS > Real Estate & Property.

description: General contractors, builders, construction managers
examples: Home builders, commercial GC, design-build firms, construction management
disambiguation_notes: Manages full construction projects. Specialty subs → Specialty Construction or specific trade

description: Roofing installation and repair contractors
examples: Residential roofers, commercial roofing, roof repair, gutter installation
disambiguation_notes: Install-focused. If manufactures roofing materials → MWD > Building Materials

description: Concrete, masonry, and stonework contractors
examples: Concrete contractors, brick masons, stonework, foundations, decorative concrete
disambiguation_notes: On-site construction work

description: Excavation, grading, demolition, earthwork, drainage, and septic system installation
examples: Excavation, grading, demolition, land clearing, trenching, site preparation, drainage installation, septic installation
disambiguation_notes: Heavy equipment site work. Includes drainage and septic INSTALLATION (construction). Septic pumping/maintenance (ongoing service) → Home & Property Services > Repair & Maintenance. NOT HVAC/Plumbing.

description: Other specialty construction trades not listed separately
examples: Structural steel erection, insulation installers, waterproofing, fencing contractors, glass installers, paving, pool construction
disambiguation_notes: Use only when no other specific construction L3 fits

description: Installs flooring, countertops, tile, and interior finishes (does not manufacture)
examples: Flooring installers, tile setters, countertop installers, drywall/painting
disambiguation_notes: Install-only. If manufactures flooring/countertops → MWD > Building Materials & Components. If manufactures AND installs cabinetry/millwork → MWD > Furniture & Fixtures (tag as business_model:make_and_install).

description: HVAC installation, repair, and maintenance
examples: Heating contractors, AC repair, HVAC installation, ductwork
disambiguation_notes: If sells equipment too → still Services & Trades (service is primary)

description: Plumbing installation, repair, and maintenance (pipes, fixtures, water heaters)
examples: Plumbers, pipe fitting, drain cleaning, water heater installation
disambiguation_notes: Service-focused plumbing contractors. Excavation/drainage/septic installation → Specialty Construction > Excavation & Earthwork. Septic pumping → Home & Property Services

description: Electrical installation, repair, and maintenance
examples: Electricians, electrical contractors, wiring, panel upgrades, lighting installation
disambiguation_notes: If manufactures electrical components → MWD > Electronics & Technology Manufacturing

description: Lawn care, landscaping, tree services, and outdoor maintenance
examples: Lawn maintenance, landscape design, tree trimming, irrigation, hardscaping
disambiguation_notes: On-site outdoor services. Nurseries/garden centers selling plants → Retail & Consumer

description: Pool and spa construction, maintenance, and repair
examples: Pool cleaning, pool construction, spa repair, hot tub installation
disambiguation_notes: On-site pool/spa work. Pool surface coatings/resurfacing → Home & Property Services > Painting & Surface Coating

description: Commercial and residential cleaning services
examples: Janitorial, maid services, carpet cleaning, pressure washing, window cleaning
disambiguation_notes: Service-based cleaning. If manufactures cleaning products → MWD

description: Environmental remediation, testing, and compliance services
examples: Asbestos removal, mold remediation, environmental testing, hazmat cleanup
disambiguation_notes: Environmental field work. Environmental consulting (office-based) → PBS > Architectural & Engineering Services

description: Recycling, waste hauling, and waste management services
examples: Recycling centers, waste haulers, junk removal, document shredding
disambiguation_notes: Active waste handling services

description: Installs and services security and alarm systems
examples: Alarm installation, CCTV installation, access control, security monitoring
disambiguation_notes: Installs/services systems. If manufactures security equipment → MWD > Safety & Security Equipment. NOT Home Watch (which is property monitoring, not system installation)

description: Installs and services fire protection and suppression systems
examples: Fire alarm installation, sprinkler systems, fire extinguisher service, fire protection
disambiguation_notes: Install/service focus. Fire equipment manufacturing → MWD

description: Home watch, property monitoring, and property check services for absentee owners
examples: Home watch companies, seasonal property monitoring, vacant home checks, snowbird services
disambiguation_notes: Distinct from property management (office/admin → PBS) and security system installation (→ Security & Alarm). Name override: 'home watch' or 'homewatch' in account name → classify here at 0.90 confidence

description: Painting contractors, surface treatment, coatings, and refinishing for residential and light commercial
examples: Residential painters, commercial painters, wallpapering, decorative finishes, pool resurfacing, cabinet refinishing
disambiguation_notes: V7: Moved from Other Field Services to Home & Property Services. On-site painting and coating work. Industrial coatings at scale → MWD. Pool surface coatings → here (surface application, not pool construction)

description: Pest control, extermination, and wildlife removal for residential and light commercial
examples: Exterminators, termite control, wildlife removal, mosquito control, rodent control
disambiguation_notes: V7: Moved from Other Field Services to Home & Property Services. On-site pest/wildlife services

description: On-site residential repair, maintenance, and restoration services
examples: Appliance repair, handyman services, home restoration, sealcoating (residential), property maintenance
disambiguation_notes: V7: Split from Repair & Maintenance Services (82). Residential on-site repair/maintenance. Industrial/commercial equipment maintenance → Industrial & Commercial Field Services. Includes repair shops where customer brings item in, UNLESS automotive (→ Automotive Services & Retail).

description: Other residential field services not fitting specific categories
examples: Christmas light installation, stairlift installation, concierge home services, chimney sweep, gutter cleaning
disambiguation_notes: V7: Catch-all for residential field services. Use ONLY when no other Home & Property Services L3 fits

description: On-site welding, mobile fabrication, field welding/repair services
examples: Mobile welders, on-site fabrication, marine welding services, pipeline welding, structural field welding
disambiguation_notes: V7 NEW. Must be field/on-site work. Shop-based fabrication → MWD > Metal Fabrication & Structural. If makes metal products in shop → MWD (tag as business_model:make_and_install if they also do on-site work).

description: Inspections, surveying, compliance field work, and specialty technical audits
examples: Home inspectors, land surveyors, environmental inspectors, code compliance, compressed air audits, leak detection
disambiguation_notes: V7: Moved from Other Field Services. On-site inspection/measurement/audit work

description: Moving, rigging, and relocation services
examples: Residential movers, commercial movers, heavy equipment rigging, senior move management, industrial relocation
disambiguation_notes: Physically moves items/equipment. Freight/trucking companies → MWD > Transportation & Logistics

description: Water well drilling, water treatment, water softening, and water management
examples: Well drillers, water treatment installers, water softener companies, water testing services
disambiguation_notes: On-site water services. Plumbing (pipes/fixtures) → Plumbing Services. Environmental testing → Environmental Services

description: On-site commercial and industrial equipment repair, maintenance, and restoration
examples: Industrial equipment maintenance, elevator maintenance, commercial property restoration, asphalt repair (commercial)
disambiguation_notes: V7: Split from Repair & Maintenance Services (82). Commercial/industrial on-site repair. Residential → Home & Property Services. Marine/boat repair → here (commercial equipment). Dental/medical equipment repair → here.

description: Other commercial/industrial field services not fitting specific categories
examples: Oilfield services, industrial cleaning, specialty equipment services
disambiguation_notes: V7: Catch-all for commercial field services. Use ONLY when no other Industrial & Commercial Field Services L3 fits. Includes low-voltage/cabling installers (on-site work).

description: Management, strategy, operations, and general business consulting
examples: Management consulting, strategy firms, operations consulting, franchise consulting, compliance consulting, compressed air system consulting
disambiguation_notes: ONLY for firms whose primary service is advising on business strategy/operations. NOT a catch-all. Accounting → Accounting & Bookkeeping. QB implementation → IT Consulting. Coaching → Coaching & Training.

description: Manages properties on behalf of owners — admin/office function
examples: Property management companies, HOA management, rental management, commercial property management
disambiguation_notes: Administrative property management. Home Watch (physical checks) → Services & Trades > Home Watch Services

description: Facilitates buying, selling, or leasing property as agent/broker
examples: Real estate agencies, realtors, commercial brokers, real estate sales offices
disambiguation_notes: DISTINCT from Property Management. Brokers facilitate transactions; property managers handle ongoing operations for owners.

description: CPA firms, tax preparers, and seasonal tax filing services
examples: CPA firms, tax preparers, enrolled agents, seasonal tax offices, IRS representation
disambiguation_notes: Highly seasonal (Q1/Q2 peak). If the firm primarily does ongoing bookkeeping year-round → Bookkeeping & Payroll Services.

description: Ongoing bookkeeping, payroll processing, and financial record maintenance
examples: Bookkeepers, payroll services, QuickBooks bookkeeping consultants who do the books, accounts receivable/payable services
disambiguation_notes: Recurring, year-round transactional work. QB test: Does the client send this firm their books to be done? → here. Does the client hire them to set up/teach QB? → IT Consulting.

description: Strategic financial advisory, fractional CFO services, and financial planning for businesses
examples: Fractional CFOs, financial advisors to businesses, virtual CFO services, financial strategy consulting
disambiguation_notes: High-margin, low-volume strategic work. Distinct from Bookkeeping (transactional) and Tax Prep (compliance).

description: Managed service providers offering subscription-based IT support, helpdesk, and infrastructure management
examples: Managed service providers, outsourced IT departments, remote monitoring, helpdesk, network management, cybersecurity-as-a-service
disambiguation_notes: Subscription/recurring revenue model. Takes operational ownership of client IT. If project-based → IT Consulting & Implementation.

description: Project-based IT consulting, software implementation, ERP migration, and technology advisory
examples: QuickBooks implementation consultants, ERP consultants, cloud migration services, IT strategy advisors, cybersecurity consultants (project-based)
disambiguation_notes: Project/SOW-based revenue model. QB test: Does the client hire them to set up/teach QB? → here. Does the client send them their books? → Accounting. If building/selling own software → Software & SaaS.

description: Data analytics, BI, reporting, and data management services
examples: Data analytics firms, BI consultants, dashboard builders, data scientists
disambiguation_notes: Data/analytics as primary service offering

description: Telecom services, internet providers, VoIP, cloud communications
examples: Phone system providers, ISPs, VoIP companies, cloud communications providers, telecom consultants
disambiguation_notes: Service providers. Telecom equipment manufacturing → MWD. Cabling/low-voltage installers (on-site work) → S&T > Industrial & Commercial Field Services

description: Develops or sells software products, SaaS platforms, apps
examples: Software companies, SaaS providers, app developers, custom software shops, digital platforms
disambiguation_notes: PROMOTED to own L2 in V7 (was under IT Services & Technology). Builds/sells software. IT consulting (advises on others' software) → IT Services & Technology. Digital news/media platforms → Media & Publishing

description: Law firms, legal consultants, and legal service providers
examples: Law firms, paralegals, legal consultants, compliance advisors, notaries
disambiguation_notes: Legal-focused professional services

description: Architecture firms, engineering consultants, specialized technical consulting
examples: Architects, civil engineers, structural engineers, environmental engineers, renewable energy consultants
disambiguation_notes: Design/engineering professional services. If primarily on-site construction → Services & Trades

description: Marketing agencies, advertising firms, and marketing consultants
examples: Marketing agencies, SEO firms, digital marketing, ad agencies, PR firms
disambiguation_notes: Strategy/campaign focused. Creative production → Creative & Production Services

description: Creative design, media production, and content services
examples: Graphic design, video production, photography, content agencies, web design studios
disambiguation_notes: Creates creative assets. Printing as manufacturing → see Printing & Graphics

description: News organizations, publishers, digital media, editorial services, digital news platforms
examples: Newspapers, magazines, book publishers, digital news sites, podcast networks, editorial services, news apps
disambiguation_notes: Publishing/editorial focus including digital media platforms. News organizations, digital news outlets/apps → HERE, NOT Marketing & Creative Services. Marketing agencies → Marketing & Advertising.

description: Print shops, signage, graphic reproduction, custom embroidery and branded merchandise
examples: Print shops, sign shops, screen printing, large format printing, promotional products, trophy/engraving shops, custom embroidery on workwear
disambiguation_notes: Commercial printing, signage, and branded merchandise services. Custom embroidery/printing on workwear → here (production service, not marketing). Sign manufacturers who also install → MWD, classify by what they make. Trophy/engraving shops → here.

description: Medical practices, clinics, and healthcare service providers
examples: Medical practices, dental offices, chiropractic, physical therapy, veterinary clinics, home health
disambiguation_notes: Provides care/treatment. Medical device mfg → MWD. Medical supply distribution → MWD

description: Schools, training providers, tutoring, research institutions, and educational organizations
examples: Schools, tutoring services, trade schools, child care centers, driving schools, research labs, think tanks, IT certification courses, STEM enrichment programs
disambiguation_notes: Provides education/training/research as primary function

description: Executive coaching, leadership development, professional training, personal development
examples: Executive coaches, leadership trainers, life coaches, professional development firms, business coaching
disambiguation_notes: DISTINCT from Strategy & Management Consulting (which advises on business operations). Coaching focuses on personal/professional development of individuals.

description: Non-profit organizations, charities, foundations, and community service organizations
examples: Charities, foundations, civic organizations, community resource centers, advocacy groups
disambiguation_notes: V7: Split from Non-profit, Government & Religious (144). Non-commercial organizations funded by donations/grants

description: Government agencies, public sector entities, and quasi-governmental organizations
examples: Government agencies, public utilities, municipal services, public safety departments
disambiguation_notes: V7: Split from Non-profit, Government & Religious (144). Tax-funded public entities

description: Churches, temples, mosques, synagogues, religious ministries, and faith-based organizations
examples: Churches, temples, religious ministries, faith-based non-profits, ministry support organizations
disambiguation_notes: V7: Split from Non-profit, Government & Religious (144). Faith-based organizations

description: Financial services, insurance, surety bonds, and investment firms
examples: Insurance agencies, financial advisors, investment firms, mortgage brokers, credit unions, surety bond providers
disambiguation_notes: Financial products/services. Accounting → Accounting & Bookkeeping (separate)

description: Payment processing, credit card processing, digital payments, financial technology
examples: Payment processors, merchant services, POS system providers, digital wallet providers
disambiguation_notes: Technology-enabled financial services. Traditional banking/insurance → Financial & Insurance Services

description: Staffing agencies, recruiters, and HR service providers
examples: Staffing agencies, recruiters, HR consultants, PEOs, temp agencies, healthcare staffing
disambiguation_notes: Provides labor/HR services

description: Retail stores selling general consumer merchandise
examples: Gift shops, general stores, online retailers, thrift stores, convenience stores
disambiguation_notes: B2C retail. If primarily B2B wholesale → MWD > appropriate distribution L3

description: Niche retail serving specific consumer segments (INVESTIGATE for V7 sub-splits)
examples: Hobby shops, book stores, music stores, craft supply retail, home decor retail, mobility equipment retail
disambiguation_notes: Distinct consumer niche. V7 TODO: Cluster analysis to identify sub-splits where groups have 15+ accounts. Apply storefront test: if B2C with storefront → here. If B2B → MWD. Mobility equipment (stairlifts, wheelchairs sold B2C) → here. Equipment HIRE/rental businesses with consumer-facing yard → here.

description: Restaurants, cafes, bakeries (retail), coffee shops with cafes, and food service establishments
examples: Restaurants, cafes, retail bakeries, food trucks, catering, juice bars, coffee retailers with cafes
disambiguation_notes: Sells food/beverage to consumers. Storefront test: company with cafes/retail locations → here (e.g., Irving Farm). Food manufacturing (wholesale) → MWD

description: Hotels, lodging, tourism, and travel services
examples: Hotels, B&Bs, travel agencies, tour operators, resorts, vacation rentals
disambiguation_notes: Hospitality and travel experiences

description: Auto repair shops, dealerships, vehicle dealers, and automotive retail
examples: Auto repair, tire shops, car dealerships, auto body, oil change, car wash, electric vehicle dealers
disambiguation_notes: Customer-facing automotive. Authorized vehicle dealers (including EV) → here. Automotive parts wholesale → MWD > Automotive Parts Distribution. Includes repair shops where customer brings vehicle in (auto body, tire shop, oil change).

description: Pet care services and pet product retail
examples: Pet grooming, dog walking, pet stores, veterinary retail, pet boarding, pet training, natural pet products
disambiguation_notes: Consumer-facing pet businesses. Veterinary medical practice → PBS > Healthcare & Medical Services

description: Personal care, wellness, fitness, and beauty services
examples: Salons, spas, gyms, yoga studios, massage therapy, barber shops
disambiguation_notes: Consumer wellness/beauty services

description: Sports, recreation, and entertainment retail/services
examples: Sports equipment retail, recreation centers, bowling alleys, golf courses, fitness equipment
disambiguation_notes: Consumer sports/rec. Sports merchandise wholesale → MWD > Consumer Goods Distribution

description: Event planning, entertainment services, and venues
examples: Event planners, DJs, wedding venues, party rentals, entertainment companies, performers
disambiguation_notes: Event and entertainment services

description: Farms, ranches, nurseries, and agricultural operations
examples: Farms, ranches, nurseries, garden centers, agricultural co-ops, farm stands
disambiguation_notes: Agricultural production or direct-to-consumer farm sales. Farm equipment mfg → MWD

description: Insufficient data to classify confidently
examples: Accounts with no website content, no self-selection, and no enrichment data
disambiguation_notes: Use when description is name-only and no corroborating signals exist. Per UNCLASSIFIABLE re-review (Apr 30, 2026): prefer this over over-classifying on weak evidence.
